message:
test(proptest): add 20 property tests for session topology lifecycle coverage gaps

New tests ST-34 through ST-53 covering lifecycle subsystem:
- LifecycleEntityKind serde + as_str correctness
- All 4 lifecycle state enums serde roundtrips (Session/Window/Pane/Agent)
- LifecycleEvent serde (10 variants)
- LifecycleIdentity serde + stable_key 5-part format
- LifecycleState tagged serde + kind() + label()
- LifecycleEntityRecord serde + stable_key delegation
- LifecycleTransitionContext serde + new() constructor
- LifecycleTransitionRequest serde
- LifecycleDecision serde
- LifecycleTransitionLogEntry serde
- State machine transitions: session, pane, agent happy paths
- ForceClose universality from all states
- Idempotent transition flagging
- Invalid transition error detection
- apply_lifecycle_state_transition delegation

Total: 33→53 tests (20 new), all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
